studies.title: Innovative Back Pain Therapy with eHealth for our Patients

_verification.reason: The study specifically mentions that patients in the intervention group are treated with a back pain app by Kaia, which is the product Kaia Rückenschmerzen - Rückentraining für Zuhause. This is confirmed by the description of the intervention in the full text.

_classification.reason: The provided content describes a study protocol for an intervention using an eHealth app for back pain, but does not provide results or specify randomization, making it ineligible as a primary RCT or RWE study.

studies._rejection_reason: The provided content describes a study protocol for an intervention using an eHealth app for back pain, but does not provide results or specify randomization, making it ineligible as a primary RCT or RWE study.
